feat.name: Adamantine Body
feat.text: With your strong will and even stronger body, you shrug off an otherwise devastating blow. You gain resistance equal to 2 + half your level against all damage from the triggering attack or effect.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An attack or effect would deal damage to you.
